# mtncloud_wiki_page (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud wiki page by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_wiki_page" "runbook" {
  name = "Deployment Runbook"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name (title) of the wiki page to look up.

### Read-Only

- `category` (String) Category the wiki page belongs to.
- `content` (String) Markdown content of the wiki page.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the wiki page.
